title: Ionic Crystal Lattice Visualizer
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Interactive MicroSim showing NaCl, MgO, CaF2, and CsCl lattices with adjustable grid size and rotation.

learningObjectives: Describe the 3D arrangement of ions in common lattice types
Relate ion charge/size to lattice energy

keyQuestions: Why do smaller, more charged ions increase lattice energy?
How does the CsCl lattice differ from NaCl?
commonMisconceptions: Lattice energy only depends on charge
assessmentOpportunities: Have students explain which compound has the larger lattice energy and justify with the visualization
